# siteinfo-v1_system_load_balancer (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `metadata` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--metadata))
- `spec` (Attributes) SystemLoadBalancerSpec defines the desired state of SystemLoadBalancer (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--spec))

### Optional

- `alarms` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--alarms))
- `api_version` (String)
- `deviations` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--deviations))
- `kind` (String)
- `name` (String) name of the SystemLoadBalancer
- `namespace` (String) the namespace scope in which to operate
- `status` (Attributes) SystemLoadBalancerStatus defines the observed state of SystemLoadBalancer (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--status))

<a id="nestedatt--metadata"></a>
### Nested Schema for `metadata`

Required:

- `name` (String)
- `namespace` (String)

Optional:

- `annotations` (Map of String)
- `labels` (Map of String)


<a id="nestedatt--spec"></a>
### Nested Schema for `spec`

Optional:

- `node_selectors` (List of String) Label selector to select nodes on which to configure the parameters.
- `nodes` (List of String) List of nodes on which to configure the parameteers.
- `srlinux` (Attributes) SR Linux Load Balancer configuration. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--spec--srlinux))
- `sros` (Attributes) SROS Load Balancer configuration. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--spec--sros))

<a id="nestedatt--spec--srlinux"></a>
### Nested Schema for `spec.srlinux`

Optional:

- `dynamic_load_balancing` (Attributes) Dynamic Load Balancer configuration. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--spec--srlinux--dynamic_load_balancing))
- `hash_options` (Attributes) Hashing options. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--spec--srlinux--hash_options))

<a id="nestedatt--spec--srlinux--dynamic_load_balancing"></a>
### Nested Schema for `spec.srlinux.dynamic_load_balancing`

Optional:

- `flowset_size` (Number) The number of flowset entries reserved for each aggregate ECMP group.
- `inactivity_timer_us` (Number) The flow inactivity timer in microseconds.
- `mode` (String) The dynamic load balancing mode.
- `sampling_interval_us` (Number) The sampling interval of interface state, in microseconds.
- `weighting` (Attributes) Weighting factors for dynamic load balancing. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--spec--srlinux--dynamic_load_balancing--weighting))

<a id="nestedatt--spec--srlinux--dynamic_load_balancing--weighting"></a>
### Nested Schema for `spec.srlinux.dynamic_load_balancing.weighting`

Optional:

- `ingress_traffic_manager_utilization_percent` (Number) Weight assigned to ingress Traffic Manager utilization.
- `port_utilization_percent` (Number) Weight assigned to port utilization.
- `queue_utilization_percent` (Number) Weight assigned to queue utilization.



<a id="nestedatt--spec--srlinux--hash_options"></a>
### Nested Schema for `spec.srlinux.hash_options`

Optional:

- `destination_ip` (Boolean) Include destination IP address in hash calculation.
- `destination_port` (Boolean) Include destination port in hash calculation.
- `flow_label` (Boolean) Include IPV6 Flow Label in hash calculation.
- `label_stack` (Boolean) Include MPLS Label Stack in hash calculation.
- `protocol` (Boolean) Include IP protocol in hash calculation.
- `source_ip` (Boolean) Include source IP address in hash calculation.
- `source_port` (Boolean) Include source port in hash calculation.
- `vlan_id` (Boolean) Include VLAN ID in hash calculation.



<a id="nestedatt--spec--sros"></a>
### Nested Schema for `spec.sros`

Optional:

- `hash_options` (Attributes) Hashing options. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--spec--sros--hash_options))

<a id="nestedatt--spec--sros--hash_options"></a>
### Nested Schema for `spec.sros.hash_options`

Optional:

- `enhanced_eler` (Boolean) Enables Enhanced eLER Load Balancing.
- `enhanced_multicast` (Boolean) Enables Enhanced Multicast Load Balancing.
- `layer4` (Boolean) Enables Layer 4 Load Balancing.
- `lsr_mode` (String) Defines load balancing more for LSR role.
- `service_id` (Boolean) Enables VLL Service ID Load Balancing.
- `system_ip` (Boolean) Enables use of the System IP address as a hashing input.




<a id="nestedatt--alarms"></a>
### Nested Schema for `alarms`

Optional:

- `critical` (Number)
- `major` (Number)
- `minor` (Number)
- `warning` (Number)


<a id="nestedatt--deviations"></a>
### Nested Schema for `deviations`

Optional:

- `count` (Number)


<a id="nestedatt--status"></a>
### Nested Schema for `status`

Optional:

- `srlinux_nodes` (List of String) List of nodes this CR has been applied to
- `sros_nodes` (List of String)
